title: phyllanthus cyrtostylus
intro: Phyllanthus cyrtostylus, also known as the Makabuhay plant, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cyrtostylus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its ability to support liver health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
